prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 56.1 kg; Height 171.8 cm; BMI 19.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.0%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 181mg/dL; 6 months ago 189mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.3kg; 9 months ago 56.7kg; 6 months ago 56.2kg; 3 months ago 55.9kg; current 56.1kg), Height (12 months ago 171.8cm; 9 months ago 171.8cm; 6 months ago 171.8cm; 3 months ago 171.8cm; current 171.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 123mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 48U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 54U/L), AST (12 months ago 99U/L; 9 months ago 105U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 98U/L; current 106U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 208mg/g; 9 months ago 192mg/g; 6 months ago 139mg/g; 3 months ago 174mg/g; current 135mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 181mg/dL; 9 months ago 163mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 182mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.66 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
